metadata.name: Launch New Jersey in Online Store

description: A team is launching a new alternate jersey and needs to make it available for sale in the online store at a specific time.

nodes.task_description: Create a new product page for the jersey in the e-commerce system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up the product page with images, description, and pricing.

nodes.task_description: Upload the inventory levels for each size.

expected_outcome.value: Agent inputs the stock levels for the new jersey.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the product page to go live at the designated launch time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent schedules the page to become visible to the public at the correct time.
